title: Modern Studio in IT Park
description: Fully furnished studio unit in the heart of Cebu IT Park. Perfect for young professionals. Walking distance to restaurants, cafes, and offices. 24/7 security, swimming pool, and gym access included.

title: Cozy 1BR Condo at Baseline
description: Spacious 1-bedroom condo with city views. Located in the popular Baseline Center with shopping mall access. Fully furnished with modern appliances.

title: Spacious 2BR near SM City
description: Large 2-bedroom apartment just 5 minutes from SM City Cebu. Great for families. Pet-friendly building with playground for kids.

title: Budget-Friendly Room in Banilad

description: 3-bedroom house with front and back yard. Private parking for 2 cars. Quiet neighborhood, near schools and churches.
